---
title: "Exploring Storms"
author: "ethanyaozers"
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tidyverse))
```

```{r}
#| label: storms-plot
storms |>
  filter(status %in% c("Tropical Depression", "Tropical Storm", "Hurricane")) |>
  distinct(year, name, status) |>
  count(year, status) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = n, fill = status)) +
  geom_area(position = "stack", alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Tropical Depression" = "#ADD8E6",
      "Tropical Storm" = "#FF8C00",
      "Hurricane" = "#8B0000"
    ),
    name = "Storm Type"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Count of Storm Types per Year",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Count",
    fill = "Storm Type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```
